faq.q: How many GCC centers does AB operate in India?
faq.a: AB operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AB have GCC centers in?

faq.q: How many people work at AB's India GCCs?
faq.a: AB's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AB's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at AB's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
